step_outcomes.1: Sessions table, auth service (bcrypt tokens/sessions), real auth middleware replacing stub. Zero existing test breakage via pre-hashed token.
step_outcomes.2: User service + auth routes (setup/login/logout/me) + user management routes (CRUD, rotate-token, deactivate). Admin role enforcement.
step_outcomes.3: Setup wizard, login page, auth guard in router, user menu with logout.
step_outcomes.4: User management UI: user table, add user dialog (human/AI), API token display on creation, rotate token, deactivate/activate.
step_outcomes.5: Task workflow engine: status transition validation via TASK_TRANSITION_MAP, pick_next_task with atomic claim, autonomy guardrails (can_self_assign, max_concurrent_tasks, etc.).
step_outcomes.6: MCP write tools: pm_implement_proposal, pm_pick_next_task, pm_start_task, pm_complete_task, pm_request_review, pm_block_task.
step_outcomes.7: MCP context tools: pm_create_task, pm_update_task, pm_add_comment, pm_log_decision, pm_report_progress, pm_set_task_context, pm_link_git_ref. Board resource.
step_outcomes.8: Event bus refactor: typed EventEmitter, activity log listener, all 4 services emit events instead of inline logActivity calls.
step_outcomes.9: SSE endpoint (GET /events with project_id filter), frontend useSSE hook with TanStack Query cache invalidation and toast notifications.
step_outcomes.10: Activity feed page (chronological, filtered, paginated), dashboard (stats, recent activity, my tasks, attention needed).

parallelism_notes: Steps 2+5 parallel, Steps 3+4+6+8 parallel (3 agents), Steps 7+9 parallel.
